message:
fix: Add missing runtime exports and fix bigIntCompare pointer handling

- Export subtractNum for unary operator tests
- Export parseIntToBigInt for int literal tests
- Export bigIntCompare for BigInt comparisons
- Fix bigIntCompare to handle both pointer and value arguments
  (BigInt.compare requires pointers, but callers may pass values)

This enables test_unary and test_binop to pass.
